title: Asuka Almost Got De Faced in 20
display_title: Asuka Almost Got De Faced in 20
wikitext:
[]: Asuka Almost Got De-Faced in 2.0?             Quote Post by SAWgunner » Wed Jan 18, 2012 5:45 am [url]http://www.sankakucomplex.com/2010/09/10/asuka-narrowly-spared-guro-mutilation-in-evangelion-2-0/[/url] If this has been addressed already please delete. This is some pretty wild stuff though and I wonder if they would have eliminated her in this fashion or if it would have been part of some scary dream sequence in the plug (most likely while within Unit 3). Personally, I'm fine with disturbing stuff like this but when they flayed Shinji, it looked like all he did was turn red so it may have been better that it was dropped.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Jan 18, 2012 5:58 am Yep, it has been discussed, 1731298478 also translated the associated interview .

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Wed Jan 18, 2012 5:47 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: Yep, it has been discussed, 1731298478 also translated the associated interview .

[]:             Quote Post by Xacebans » Fri Jan 20, 2012 9:43 pm Ew, that is very gross. If it were a dream sequence or something I wouldn't care but if they kept that in the movie as something hat actually happens to her or if they add it to the new ones it would have/will make me very upset. While the movies are a little grotesque at times, completely facially mutilating a character like that would just be distasteful and kind of... Cheap? I don't know, but just doing something so outright icky like that doesn't seem like that great of an idea. Sure, Eva does have its fair share of icky, but that's just going overboard.

[]:             Quote Post by Brainman » Fri Jan 20, 2012 11:11 pm ^ Well, I'd agree except that End of Evangelion has one or two scenes that already set the bar pretty high for lack of taste and general ickiness. Plus I think it was supposed to mirror Shinji's face coming off at the end of 2.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Jan 21, 2012 2:31 am driftking18594 wrote: Hmm...interesting. Could this foreshadow some possible Asuka vs. Kaworu conflict?

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sat Jan 21, 2012 10:52 am Going be what Kaworu told Asuka it seems to me like he was brainwashing her.
